creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

We are not a mind reader. Please provide us the useful info, so follow this: 

http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html 

I am going to close this PR. Report in freebsd-gnome@FreeBSD.org again if you 
are going to follow bugging.html.
